term_display: cards that can cause players to gain life
cards that create creature tokens explicitly during combat
cards that exile themselves from your graveyard as a cost of their own activated ability Ex. Renew, Scavenge, etc.
cards that have or reference adventures or omens
cards that have or reference plot, foretell, or airbending
cards that may “enter the battlefield as a copy” of something
cards that reference “food” or the ability “forage”
cards that reference “infect” or “toxic” or “poison counter” or “poisonous”
cards that reference cascade or discover
cards that reference casting your second spell per turn
cards that reference charge counters or spacecraft
cards that reference committing a crime
cards that reference convoke, waterbending, or improvise
cards that reference descend, revolt, or void
cards that reference earthbending or land creatures
cards that reference embalm or eternalize
cards that reference face down cards on the battlefield.
cards that reference firebending or generate mana when they attack
cards that reference flashback or harmonize
cards that reference madness or mayhem
cards that reference ninjutsu or web-slinging
cards that reference players winning or losing the game
cards that reference rooms or unlocking
cards that reference speed or start your engines!
cards that reference spore counters or with “thallid” in their names
cards that reference The Ring or your ringbearer
cards that reference time counters or suspend
cards that reference vehicles, crew, mounts, or saddle
cards with “Undergrowth” or that reference “for each creature card in your graveyard”
cards with a “landfall” ability or ability that triggers whenever a land enters under your control
cards with abilities that trigger when you gain life
cards with an energy symbol or that reference energy
cards with Survival abilities or abilities that trigger whenever the card becomes tapped

cards with X in their mana cost, an alternative cost, an additional cost, or that reference cards with X in any of these costs
